A. <silver metallic bicycle wheel hub with black gear teeth> B. <human finger with light skin tone and short fingernail> C. <hexagonal metal nut with yellow alignment marks> D. <silver metal bicycle spokes radiating outward>

In the segment where the finger points to the side of the hub assembly, which specific position is indicated? A. center B. left side C. central axle D. central nut
During the segment where the finger points at the component featuring yellow alignment marks, which part is indicated? A. black sprocket B. central axle C. central nut D. left side
What action is the person performing with the black plastic component? A. wiping the rotor B. aligning the component C. greasing the axle D. spinning the spokes
Describe the sequence of physical interactions performed on the bicycle hub assembly throughout the clip.
canonical_answer: At 2s, fingers spin the central axle causing rapid rotation; at 4s, the hand presses down on the metal sprocket to stop motion; at 6s, a finger points directly at the black sprocket teeth; at 12s, the finger indicates the greasy central axle nut with yellow marks.

question: What action is being performed on the bicycle hub assembly in this segment? A. The black ring is being rotated clockwise using a tool. B. Fingers are pressing down on the metal sprocket to stop rotation. C. The black ring is being lifted off the hub assembly. D. A black tool is being twisted onto the hub mechanism.

How has the bicycle hub's motion changed since the start of the video? A. It remained stationary the entire time B. It began spinning rapidly then stopped C. It was spinning rapidly from the very beginning D. It was rotated slowly without blurring
The person positions a black ring over the hub; what do they do with it next?
canonical_answer: Lifts the black plastic ring off

question: What step came IMMEDIATELY before removing the black lock ring tool? A. Spinning the central axle rapidly B. Pressing down on the metal sprocket C. Using the black tool to tighten the lockring D. Pointing directly at the black sprocket
